title: How to win the Amazon Buy Box in 2026
excerpt: The pricing, fulfillment and account-health signals that decide who owns the Buy Box.
body: The Amazon Buy Box accounts for the vast majority of sales on any listing — if you don't own it, your offer is effectively invisible. Winning it consistently in 2026 comes down to a handful of signals Amazon weighs on every single page view.
## Price competitively, not desperately

Amazon rewards a fair landed price — item plus shipping — not simply the lowest number. Race-to-the-bottom pricing erodes your margin without guaranteeing the box. We set rule-based repricing with a floor that protects profit and still reacts to competitors in near real time.
## Fulfillment is your biggest lever

Prime-eligible offers through FBA or Seller-Fulfilled Prime win the Buy Box far more often than standard fulfillment. A fast, reliable delivery promise carries more weight with the algorithm than a few cents of price difference ever will.
## Protect your account health

A strong Order Defect Rate, low late-shipment and cancellation rates, and healthy inventory all feed Buy Box eligibility. A single account-health issue can quietly drop you out of the box across your entire catalog.
The signals we monitor daily:
- Landed price versus the competition
- Prime eligibility and delivery speed
- Seller metrics: ODR, late-shipment and cancellation rates
- Inventory depth and restock timing
## The takeaway
The Buy Box isn't won once — it's defended every day. We manage pricing, fulfillment and account health together so your listings stay in the box and keep converting.

title: TikTok Shop: a launch checklist for new brands
excerpt: Everything you need to set up Shop, connect creators and run your first LIVE.
body: TikTok Shop has become one of the fastest routes from discovery to checkout — but a rushed launch leaves sales on the table. Here's the checklist we run for every new brand we onboard.
## 1. Set up Shop correctly

Verify your business, connect your account, and configure shipping templates, returns and payments before you list a single product. Getting compliance right up front avoids holds and headaches later.
## 2. Get your catalog live and optimized
Sync your catalog, write short-form-friendly titles, and lead with video. Products that show well in a vertical 9:16 frame convert far better than flat, catalog-style photos.
## 3. Turn on creators and affiliates
TikTok Shop is a creator engine. Open your affiliate program, set commissions that are genuinely worth a creator's time, and seed product to a focused shortlist of creators in your niche.
## 4. Go LIVE
Schedule regular LIVE shopping sessions and pair them with Spark Ads to amplify what's already working. Early on, consistency beats production value every time.
Your first-week checklist:
- Business verification complete
- Catalog synced with video-first listings
- Affiliate program open with sensible commissions
- First LIVE scheduled and promoted
Do these four things well and you'll have a Shop that's ready to scale — not just switched on.

title: Etsy SEO: ranking your listings the right way
excerpt: How tags, titles and attributes work together inside the Etsy search algorithm.
body: Etsy SEO rewards relevance and quality together. Stuffing keywords won't save a listing that buyers scroll past — but the right tags, titles and attributes put you in front of shoppers who are ready to buy.
## How Etsy search actually works

Etsy first matches a query to your listing using titles, tags, categories and attributes, then ranks the matches with a quality score built from clicks, favorites and conversions. Relevance gets you into the race; quality is what wins it.
## Titles, tags and attributes work together
Use all thirteen tags with multi-word phrases your buyers actually search, mirror those phrases in the first few words of your title, and complete every attribute — they double as hidden tags.
Where to focus first:
- Thirteen long-tail tags — never single words
- Front-load the title with your strongest phrase
- Complete every category and attribute
- Match your listing photos to the search intent
## Beyond keywords: quality signals

Great photography, competitive shipping (free-shipping thresholds help), strong reviews and a healthy conversion rate all lift your ranking over time. SEO opens the door; the listing experience keeps it open.
Treat Etsy SEO as ongoing maintenance rather than a one-time setup, and your best listings will compound visibility month after month.
